prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk character portrait of a confident adult woman standing in a rainy neon city alley at night, framed from upper thighs to above the head. She has extremely long, thick electric purple hair styled with a high voluminous crown, loose bangs sweeping across one side, multiple side braids, and one massive rope braid falling past her hips to the lower right. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered solid square censor block in muted mauve-brown. She wears exactly 6 visible outfit elements: a cropped light gray tank top, a shiny metallic silver bomber jacket with purple trim, raised spiked shoulders, purple dragon embroidery on both sleeves, glossy black high-waisted short shorts, and a wide purple belt. Her pose is powerful and fashion-editorial, with one hand on her hip and the other arm relaxed, emphasizing athletic proportions and wet reflective skin. The background is a dense futuristic Korean cyberpunk alley with wet pavement, purple and cyan reflections, dark skyscrapers, mist, and exactly 5 prominent neon signs: a pink sign on the left reading Korean-style characters with small English words like “GATCHA HOUSE,” a small blue vertical sign behind her, a tall right-side vertical pink-and-blue sign with Korean characters and “CYBER HO,” a blue right-side sign with Korean characters, and a smaller magenta sign lower right. Use cinematic ultra-detailed 3D realism, glossy materials, dramatic rim lighting, saturated violet/magenta/blue color grading, shallow depth of field, high contrast, rain-slick reflections, and polished concept-art quality. No extra characters, no watermark, no logos beyond the fictional neon signage.
